title: Lebo
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Lebo''''' was the name of a group of two [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]] that carried Rebel equipment away from [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] oversaw their exit from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] blockade.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''

[[Category:Alliance to Restore the Republic starship groups]]
[[Category:Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports|*]]
